details: The agent navigated to the correct Wikipedia URL, extracted the page snapshot (964KB of accessibility tree data), and used Python to parse the actual node data to find years 2023-2025. The extraction clearly shows raw cell data pulled directly from the page (including truncated citation strings), not hallucinated content. The agent correctly reported: 2025 (John Clarke, Michel H. Devoret, John M. Martinis), 2024 (John J. Hopfield, Geoffrey Hinton), and 2023 (Pierre Agostini, Ferenc Krausz, Anne L'Huillier) with their respective reasons — matching the verified 2023 and 2024 winners and plausibly extracted 2025 data from the live page.
